visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a young man in a black T-shirt featuring an 'Old Boy' logo and a turquoise backpack, standing outdoors on a paved path. He is waving his arm and smiling broadly at the camera. The background shows a wooden fence and leafy green trees under bright daylight. (2) The scene cuts to a shot of two monkeys in a rocky enclosure behind a wire mesh fence; one monkey is perched on a ledge while another is lower down. (3) A white alpaca is shown in close-up behind a dark wooden fence, looking towards the camera with a neutral expression against a grassy background. (4) Several small squirrel monkeys are seen inside a metal cage, with some climbing the mesh. (5) An orangutan is shown resting its head against its hand behind a wire fence, looking towards the camera. (6) A large gorilla is sitting on a rock in a grassy enclosure, leaning against a fence. (7) Three monkeys are in a cage, with one actively grooming another's fur while they sit together.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 耶~歡迎來到厭世動物園. [Logo]: 狠愛演. (2) [Subtitle]: 賀甲!!. (3) [Subtitle]: 放我出去~. (4) [Subtitle]: 看三小! 我是草尼馬勒. (5) [Subtitle]: 啊! 哩是在看三小, 沒看過猴子啊? 哈?. (6) [Subtitle]: 放我出去~. (7) [Subtitle]: 嘿嘿~ 爽喔~ 坐這樣很爽~. (8) [Subtitle]: 來~ 我幫你抓蝨母. 這裡有一隻. 啊, 這裡又一隻.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, at least 2 passers-by in the blurred background at the start.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian male with short brown hair, wearing a black graphic T-shirt with 'Old Boy' text and a turquoise backpack.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves through various enclosures at a zoo, including a rocky monkey exhibit with water, a grassy alpaca paddock, and caged areas for smaller primates and great apes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an energetic male voice shouting a cheerful greeting in Mandarin over an upbeat, mid-tempo acoustic guitar and drum rhythm. The vocal is bright and high-pitched. (2) A sharp transition occurs where the speaker changes his voice to a raspy, high-pitched shout, mimicking an aggressive monkey sound while the BGM continues. (3) The speaker shifts to a lower, mocking tone, imitating an alpaca's supposed inner monologue. (4) The voice becomes even higher and more frantic, mimicking small, active primates. (5) A deep, slow, and dramatic vocal performance follows, conveying a sense of melancholy or boredom for the orangutan. (6) A casual, 'tough guy' tone is used to voice the gorilla. (7) The final phase features comedic, fast-paced narration of monkeys grooming, ending with a bright 'ding' sound effect for emphasis.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Series of Humorous Animal Observations -> Comedic Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience by visiting a zoo and providing humorous, personified voice-overs for various animals, portraying them as '厌世' (cynical or world-weary).

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the juxtaposition of neutral animal behavior and highly expressive, comedic dubbing to create a meme-like entertainment effect.
